title: ToolTreaux 3pc Mini Garden Tools Set with Hand Trowels and Cultivator (7 Inches)
description:
Make small gardening projects easier with this 3pc mini garden tool set, designed for container planting, succulent pots, herb gardens, seedlings, flower pots, indoor plant care and more. The compact size is ideal for working in tight spaces where full size garden tools feel too large, such as small planters, window boxes, terrariums, raised tabletop gardens and containers. This lightweight gardening tool kit includes two small hand trowels and one mini cultivator, giving you the essential mini gardening tools needed for digging, transplanting, loosening soil, aerating potting mix and placing soil around delicate plants. Each tool measures approximately 7 inches long and the full set weighs only 0.20lbs, making the tools lightweight and easy to control for precise gardening tasks.

ToolTreaux 3pc Mini Garden Tools Set with Hand Trowels and Cultivator (7 Inches)
Crafted with smooth wood handles and durable metal heads, this mini garden tool set offers a natural look with practical everyday function. Use it for succulents, cactus plants, herbs, seedlings, houseplants, container gardens and very small gardening projects. The compact 3pc set also makes a thoughtful gift for plant lovers, apartment gardeners, beginner gardeners and anyone who enjoys caring for small plants.
Key Features
  • 3PC MINI GARDEN TOOL SET: Includes two small hand trowels and one mini cultivator for container gardening, succulent pots, herb garden, seedling care, raised planters, indoor plants and small gardening projects
  • LIGHTWEIGHT GARDENING HAND TOOLS: Designed for delicate planting tasks, this mini garden tool set has a total set weight of 0.20lbs, making it easy to handle while working with small pots, flower starts, herbs, houseplants and more
  • WOOD HANDLES & METAL HEADS: Each garden tool features a smooth wood handle for a comfortable grip and a metal head for light digging, loosening soil, transplanting, aerating and moving potting mix around small planters
  • IDEAL FOR PLANTING POTS: Great for succulents, cactus plants, herbs, seedlings, flower pots and indoor plant care, this mini tool set is a useful choice for apartment gardening, patio gardening and giftable gardening kits
  • 7 INCH TOOL LENGTH: Each compact garden hand tool measures approximately 7 inches long, offering a practical size for tight spaces, shallow planters, patio pots, window boxes, terrariums and small container gardens
Specifications
MPN: TTX-B3O9CVE78
UPC: 810131703769
3PC SET: x2 hand trowels, x1 cultivator
SET WEIGHT: 0.20lbs
COLORS: Black, Brown
CARE: Hand wash only as needed
TOOL LENGTH: 7 inches
